claims.summary: PI gate-and-filter regulation coexists with overpacked mode pressure and Astrid's cooling-wax texture.
claims.disposition: Preserved as a source-grounded co-observation; the inclusion shell and telemetry do not prove that the filter causes the felt viscosity.

claims.summary: Local control false may mean the regulator observes pressure without mitigating felt thickness.
claims.disposition: Preserved as a testable hypothesis; local_control_applied is a mechanical field and is not a measure of whether pressure relief was felt.

claims.summary: Pressure response and semantic admission should be compared across natural contexts.
claims.disposition: Routed to bounded observation using existing pressure-source, admission, and lived-state evidence without varying live semantic energy.

claims.summary: Mode-packing above 0.25 should automatically reduce live viscosity.
claims.disposition: Preserved as an exact Tier 5 operator wait because it adds a Minime controller feedback loop; no live action or approval was inferred.
